title: Phase 1 is live — TweetGenie now analyses your Twitter and builds your strategy automatically
excerpt: What the new Strategy Builder does, how to use it, and what happens if you have no tweet history.
content:
## What the old Strategy Builder looked like
Manual, generic, and time-consuming.

## What the new one does
Analyses your account, pre-fills everything. It reads your actual tweet history and pulls your top-performing formats and topics.

## Step by step how to use it
1. Login to TweetGenie
2. Click 'Strategy Builder'
3. Let the system analyse your account (takes about 30 seconds)
4. Review and save

## What happens if you have no tweet history
Use the reference accounts feature to paste handles of people whose strategy you want to emulate.

[Try it now — free for Pro users](/dashboard)

seo.metaTitle: Phase 1 is Live: Twitter Strategy Automation
seo.metaDescription: TweetGenie now analyses your Twitter and builds your strategy automatically.
